chunks.title: Prayer for Deliverance in Youth and Old Age
chunks.reason: The psalmist opens with a plea for refuge and protection, recalling God's faithfulness from birth to old age.

chunks.title: Enemies' Plot and Call for Help
chunks.reason: The psalmist describes the specific counsel of enemies who claim God has forsaken him and urgently calls for divine intervention.

chunks.title: Confidence in God's Righteousness and Future Restoration
chunks.reason: The psalmist declares a commitment to wait on God, recount His deeds, and trust in His power to revive him from troubles.

chunks.title: Vow of Praise and Victory
chunks.reason: The psalm concludes with a musical vow to praise God with instruments and a declaration that the enemies will be humiliated.
